zh.lifeSummary: 當Per Olofsson Uvbergs於1545年出生在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德時，他的父親Olof Esbjörnsson25歲，母親Kerstin Persdotter Flemming20歲。他於1580年與Kerstin Karin Larsdotter在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1631年2月20日在他的家鄉享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Per Olofsson Uvbergs于1545年出生在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德时，他的父亲Olof Esbjörnsson25岁，母亲Kerstin Persdotter Flemming20岁。他于1580年与Kerstin Karin Larsdotter在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1631年2月20日在他的家乡享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Olofsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Iver.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Olofsson: patronymic from the personal name Olof, Swedish variant of Olaf (see Olafsen ). See also Olsson .

variants.name: Olafsen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Olaf, from Old Norse Óláfr, Ólafr, variant Óleifr, earlier Anleifr, from proto-Scandinavian elements meaning ‘ancestor’ + ‘heir, descendant’. Olaf (also Olav, in Sweden Olof) has always been one of the most common Scandinavian names; it continued to be popular in the Middle Ages, in part as a result of the fame of Saint Olaf, King of Norway, who brought Christianity to his country c. 1030. This surname is rare in Denmark. Compare Olafson .

nameMeanings.name: Per
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.
Treaty of Stolbovo ended Swedish occupation of Northern Russia.
1618-1648 Sweden fights in the Thirty Years' War.

en.lifeSummary: When Per Olofsson Uvbergs was born in 1545, in Grangärde, Dalarna, Sweden, his father, Olof Esbjörnsson, was 25 and his mother, Kerstin Persdotter Flemming, was 20. He married Kerstin Karin Larsdotter in 1580, in Grangärde, Dalarna, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 20 February 1631, in his hometown, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Per Olofsson Uvbergs est né en 1545, à Grangärde, Dalarna, Suède, son père, Olof Esbjörnsson, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Kerstin Persdotter Flemming, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Kerstin Karin Larsdotter en 1580, à Grangärde, Dalarna, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 20 février 1631, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Per Olofsson Uvbergs 1545 in Grangärde, Dalarna, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Olof Esbjörnsson 25 und seine Mutter Kerstin Persdotter Flemming 20. Er hat 1580 in Grangärde, Dalarna, Schweden Kerstin Karin Larsdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Februar 1631 im Alter von 86 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Per Olofsson Uvbergs è nato il nel 1545 nel Grangärde, Dalarna, Svezia, il suo padre, Olof Esbjörnsson, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Kerstin Persdotter Flemming, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Kerstin Karin Larsdotter nel 1580, nel Grangärde, Dalarna, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1631, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Per Olofsson Uvbergsが1545年にスウェーデンダラーナグラングaルドで生まれた時，父Olof Esbjörnssonは25歳，母Kerstin Persdotter Flemmingは20歳であった。1580年にスウェーデンダラーナグラングaルドでKerstin Karin Larsdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1631年2月20日に故郷で86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Per Olofsson Uvbergs(이)가 1545년 스웨덴 다라른아 그랑a르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Olof Esbjörnsson(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Kerstin Persdotter Flemming(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1580년 스웨덴 다라른아 그랑a르드에서 Kerstin Karin Larsdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1631년 2월 20일 그의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Per Olofsson Uvbergs nasceu em 1545, em Grangärde, Dalarna, Suécia, seu pai, Olof Esbjörnsson, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Kerstin Persdotter Flemming, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Kerstin Karin Larsdotter em 1580, em Grangärde, Dalarna, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1631, em sua cidade natal, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Per Olofsson Uvbergs родился в 1545 г. в местности грангaрд, даларна, Швеция, его отцу по имени Olof Esbjörnsson было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Kerstin Persdotter Flemming, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Kerstin Karin Larsdotter в 1580 г. в местности грангaрд, даларна, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 20 февраля 1631 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Per Olofsson Uvbergs nació en 1545, en Grangärde, Dalarna, Suecia, su papá, Olof Esbjörnsson, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Kerstin Persdotter Flemming, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Kerstin Karin Larsdotter en 1580, en Grangärde, Dalarna, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1631, en su pueblo, a la edad de 86 años.
